CustomField.label: NEPA Discipline
CustomField.description: Indexed text field identifying this specialist's NEPA field discipline. Must exactly match NEPA_Layer_Discipline__mdt.Discipline__c. Used by NEPA_Team_Assembly_Orchestrator to find the right specialist for a detected protection layer via Get Records filter (nepa_discipline__c EqualTo {Discipline} AND IsActive = true). Example values: Hydrologist, Wildlife Biologist (Sage-Grouse), Geologist, Botanist, Fisheries and Wildlife Biologist (Aquatic), Wildlife Biologist (Avian/Big Game), NEPA Specialist.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: NEPA specialist discipline (e.g., Hydrologist, Geologist, Botanist). Must match a Discipline value in the NEPA Layer Discipline custom metadata type.
